Describe the problem
A clear and concise description of what is missing, unclear, outdated, or incorrect in the documentation.

Location
Link to the page, section, or file (URL or path in the repo).

Expected improvement
What would you expect the documentation to say or show instead?

Additional context (optional)
Screenshots, examples, or related issues/PRs.
